Submitted CMG Code CHAR 10 The Case-Mix Group code that is submitted by the facility. This CMG code is calculated by the software the facility utilizes.
15 TRGT_DT TRGT_DT Target Date DATE 8 For MDS, the target date is the R4 Discharge Date for any discharge, the A4A Reentry Date for any re-entry and the A3A Assessment Reference Date for any other type of assessment.
